MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to attorney Joseph Corey to appear on January 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a response to the Examiner's notes issued December 15, 2015 has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)
